summary: Successfully analyzed 59 FOHE NYC community survey responses and extracted key insights for newsletter. Data shows strong interest in panels (66%), AI topics (41 mentions), and neighborhood-level volunteering (17 people). Created comprehensive survey_insights.yaml with statistics, community quotes, and newsletter-ready findings.
learnings: Survey shows clear preference for structured learning (panels) over pure networking - important for event planning
Geographic distribution is more diverse than expected - 34% from outside Manhattan suggests regional expansion opportunities
Volunteer interest heavily skews toward ongoing relationship roles (Neighborhood Ambassador) rather than event-specific help
Communication preference split between Slack/email suggests need for dual-channel approach
